$comment: Mobile Video Player Controls Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for the Video Player Controls atomic component — the individual interactive controls rendered inside a video player. Supports 2 platforms (Android, iOS) and 12 property1 variants: icon-button group (caption, setting, fullscreen, forward, backward, play, pause, replay, warning, Buffering), a progress bar container (progress), and a time display pill (time). ProgressBar (node 388:1598) is a nested component from the same file — its internal tokens are excluded here. Figma Reference: Node ID 928-2150

$component.name: Video Player Controls
$component.description: Atomic control elements for a mobile video player. Renders as one of three visual forms depending on the property1 variant: (1) icon-button — a 28px circular button containing an 18px icon; (2) progress — a wide pill container wrapping a ProgressBar component; (3) time — a compact pill label showing elapsed/total time. Each form has distinct Android (opaque, on-light) and iOS (translucent, on-dark video) color treatments.
$component.structure: Single element. Icon-button: 28px circle with centered 18px icon. Progress: wide pill (320px) with 8px/4px padding wrapping the ProgressBar nested component. Time: 24px-tall pill (8px H-padding) with timecode text.

platform.Android: Opaque backgrounds — gray.100 for icon-buttons and time pill; white for progress container
platform.iOS: Translucent backgrounds overlaid on dark video — 20% gray.100 for icon-buttons and time pill; 20% white for progress container

property1.caption: Closed-caption icon button
property1.warning: Alert-triangle icon button — shown on error state
property1.Buffering: Loading spinner icon button — shown during buffering
property1.progress: Wide pill container wrapping the ProgressBar component (nested, same file)
property1.time: Compact pill displaying elapsed/total time e.g. 0:00/01:16

nested-components.ProgressBar: Node ID 388:1598 — ProgressBar component from the same file. Used inside the progress variant. Internal tokens (track bg, indicator color, border-radius, label color) are defined in the ProgressBar component and excluded here.

usage.contexts: Rendered inside Video Player Media and Video Player composite components as overlaid interactive controls
usage.features: 12 control types, 2 platform color treatments (opaque Android / translucent iOS), 28px touch target for all icon buttons, progress and time variants use pill containers

icon-button.$comment: Icon button variants — caption, setting, fullscreen, forward, backward, play, pause, replay, warning, Buffering. All share the same container and icon sizing; only bg color differs by platform.

size.description: Video player control icon-button container size (width and height) - 28px

radius.description: Video player control icon-button border radius - 16px (circular pill for 28px container)

size.description: Video player control icon size within button - 18px

android.description: Video player control icon-button background for Android - neutral/gray.100 - #f2f4f7 (opaque, for light/dark surfaces)

ios.description: Video player control icon-button background for iOS - 20% opacity gray.100 - rgba(242,244,247,0.2) (translucent overlay on dark video)

progress.$comment: Progress bar container variant — wraps the ProgressBar nested component. Platform-split background and shadow.

width.description: Video player controls progress container width (standalone) - 320px. Note: overridden to 345px when used inside the full Video Player component.

horizontal.description: Video player controls progress container horizontal padding - 8px

vertical.description: Video player controls progress container vertical padding - 4px

gap.description: Video player controls progress container gap between progress bar and label - 4px

radius.description: Video player controls progress container border radius - 16px

android.description: Video player controls progress container background for Android - white - #ffffff (opaque)

ios.description: Video player controls progress container background for iOS - 20% white - rgba(255,255,255,0.2) (translucent overlay on dark video)

android.description: Video player controls progress container shadow for Android - 0px 4px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.25). No matching semantic token; iOS has no shadow (translucent bg blends into video).

time.$comment: Time display pill — shows elapsed/total timecode e.g. '0:00/01:16'. Pill shape with platform-split background and text color.

height.description: Video player controls time pill height - 24px

radius.description: Video player controls time pill border radius - 11px (near-full round for 24px height pill)

horizontal.description: Video player controls time pill horizontal padding - 8px

gap.description: Video player controls time pill gap between internal elements - 2px

android.description: Video player controls time pill background for Android - neutral/gray.100 - #f2f4f7 (opaque)

ios.description: Video player controls time pill background for iOS - 20% opacity gray.100 (translucent on dark video)

android.description: Video player controls time pill text color for Android - neutral/gray.700 - #344054

ios.description: Video player controls time pill text color for iOS - neutral/gray.100 - #f2f4f7 (near-white text on dark video backdrop)

typography.description: Video player controls time pill typography - Inter Medium 12px, 17px line-height
